name: qamomile-qcoder
description: Offline Qamomile skill pack for QCoder-style benchmark solving and paper-derived quantum algorithm demos.

interface.shortDescription: Solve QCoder-style tasks with Qamomile offline.
interface.longDescription: Guides coding agents to write, validate, and debug Qamomile quantum kernels for local QCoder-style benchmarks and selected paper-inspired algorithm demos without web access.
defaultPrompt: Use Qamomile to solve a local QCoder case.
Review this Qamomile solution for common agent mistakes.
Implement a paper-inspired Qamomile demo offline.
